class.name: CrowdControlGamePack
class.brief_description: A collection of effects, parameters, and metadata defining a CrowdControl session.
class.description: [CrowdControlGamePack] encapsulates all the [CrowdControlEffect]s available in your game. It also stores metadata through [CrowdControlGamePackMeta]. This pack can be exported to JSON for use in the CrowdControl Developer Portal.

method.name: add_effect
method.description: Adds a new [CrowdControlEffect] to the game pack. Alternatively, you can edit the [member effects] array directly.

method.name: export_to_json
method.description: Exports the entire game pack (including all effects and metadata) to a JSON file at [param path]. The generated file can be uploaded directly to the CrowdControl Developer Portal to rapidly define your game's interactivity schema.

method.name: get_effect
method.description: Searches the pack and returns the [CrowdControlEffect] with the matching [param effect_id]. Returns [code]null[/code] if none is found.

method.name: remove_effect
method.description: Removes the [CrowdControlEffect] matching the given [param effect_id] from the pack.

method.name: to_json
method.description: Serializes this [CrowdControlGamePack] into a JSON-compatible dictionary. Normally called internally by [method export_to_json].

members.member: Array of individual interactivity effects in the pack.
Stores the metadata for the pack.
